penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out by the end of the video sequence.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion status. Claude identified incomplete circle at 300 seconds (automatic zero), while GPT reported completion at 210 seconds with line deviation. Given both models noted visibility issues and unclear final state, the incomplete status takes precedence as it represents the more conservative assessment when evidence is ambiguous.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment of incomplete task aligns with automatic zero condition in rubric when circle is not fully freed

claude_value.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out by the end of the video sequence.

gpt_value.description: The cutting path deviates visibly inside the marked circle line.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete circle is a task-ending condition that supersedes line deviation penalties. Both models noted visibility issues making precise assessment difficult
